skill_text:
Speech-to-speech translation model from fairseq S2UT (paper/code) for Spanish-English. Trained on mTEDx, CoVoST 2, Europarl-ST, and VoxPopuli. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Speech-to-speech translation. API call: load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_hf_hub('facebook/unit_hifigan_mhubert_vp_en_es_fr_it3_400k_layer11_km1000_lj_dur'). This tool has no required input fields.
When to use:
- Use `fairseq__facebook_unit_hifigan_mhubert_vp_en_es_fr_it3_400k_layer11_km_46f97b0c` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
- Use examples to map paraphrases into schema-faithful arguments.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
